rulings.Case Title: LAWRENCE MOORE VS. FISCAL DYNAMICS INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday August 13, 2015, line 1. Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment Continued to August 24, 2015 for parties to submit supplemental briefing re: the scope and use of the deposition errata in light of D'Amico v. Board of Medical Examiners (1974) 11 Cal.3d 1 and Hambleton Bros. Lumber Co. v. Balking Enterprises, Inc. (2005) 397 F. 3d 1217. Supplemental briefs shall no exceed 5 pages and shall be filed no later than August 19, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KEYHAN MOHANNA VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday August 13, 2015, line 4. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint Sustained without leave to amend. Ziegler v. Nickel (1998) 64 Cal.App.4th 545. Mr. Mohanna had been on notice of the legal representation issue since April 1, 2015 and had sufficient time to hire a member of the bar to represent the interests of the Trust, the alleged owner of the Property and maker of Note/DOT. Mr. Mohanna filed the First Amended Complaint and opposition to demurrer to First Amended Complaint without addressing the issue. Additionally, First Amended Complaint fails to state facts to support a cause of action and no possibility of amendment is suggested by Plaintiff. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARK A MENDAROS VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, SUCCESS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday August 13, 2015, line 5. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint Sustained. Demurrer to the third (slander of title) and fourth (UCL violation) causes of action is sustained without leave to amend. No substantive opposition filed. Demurrer to the second cause of action (breach of contract) is sustained without leave to amend. No authorities cited by Plaintiff for the proposition that the successor in interest to beneficiary/lender is not entitled to substitute the Trustee per the terms of the Deed of Trust. Demurrer to the fifth cause of action (IIED) is sustained without leave to amend. No outrageous conduct pled and no possibility of amendment suggested. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to the first cause of action for HBOR violation for Plaintiff to allege all elements of this cause of action in light of CC 2923.6(c); CC 2923.6(g); Withers v. JP Morgan Chase Bank 2014 WL 3418367; Williams v. Wells Fargo Bank 2014 WL 1568857. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KRISTEN SWILLEY VS. DEL CURTO PROPERTIES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday August 13, 2015, line 6. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint is not uncertain, ambiguous or unintelligible within the meaning of CCP 430.10(f). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ARASH GUITY VS. STEFFAN HEUER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday August 13, 2015, line 9. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to (1) reconcile allegations in paragraph 6(a) and Exhibit 1 to Frist Amended Complaint; and (2) allege that no comparable unit is available. Demurrer is overruled re: failure to include copies of relocation checks. Complaint sufficiently alleges tender of relocation checks with the operative notice. See Exhibit 2 to FAC. To the extent Defendant argues that language regarding availability of comparable unit/characterization of the available unit as "comparable on non-comparable" must have been included in the notice, demurrer is overruled. Defendant cites no authority for the proposition that such characterization is required to be made in the operative notice. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 2070 BRYANT STREET JV, LLC VS. INNER MISSION SF, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL
